arts.ttl: “Very special” – Brighton player tipped for stardom, compared favourably with Manchester United great
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion defender Jan Paul van Heck could become better than Jaap Stam, with the Netherlands already impressed by him. That’s at least if the latest comments from ESPN analysts Kees Luijckx and Marciano Vink, via Soccer News, are anything to go by.
